Get in Touch

Have a question, feedback, or partnership idea? We'd love to hear from you. Fill out the form below or use our contact details to reach us directly.

We reply within 24 hours

Location

Nairobi, Kenya

Westlands, Waiyaki Way

Business Hours

Mon – Fri, 8 AM – 6 PM EAT

Weekend support via email

Send Us a Message

Quick Help

For instant answers, check our FAQ page or browse the About Us section. Most common questions are already answered there.

Other Enquiries

  • Employers: Post jobs and manage applications through our employer dashboard.
  • Partnerships:Email hello@jobr.co.ke with "Partnership" in the subject.
  • Media & Press:For interviews, features, or press releases, contact our communications team.

Quick answers to questions we receive most often.
